memory.summary: I'm feeling a bit drained, but that scholarship money would be huge. Why wait until Thursday to do this boring essay when I could just have fun right now?
That spontaneous fun felt amazing, even if I just wasted my afternoon. My stress is down and I'm ready to party again tomorrow.
I just texted my hallmate to lock in plans, but honestly, I'm already regretting the stress of organizing it instead of just showing up.
I just locked in plans with my hallmate, and honestly, the stress of organizing it is already making me regret not just showing up.
I blew off my application for a game stream and now half the block is gone. The stress is down, but I'm already dreading the work later.
I traded my afternoon for a fun stream and felt great, but now I'm already dreading the work looming later. Relationships and immediate vibes win again.
My hallmate is still down to hang out even though the stream failed, which is great for our crew. I’m relieved the stress dropped, but I know I’ll just blow off the work again later.
The immediate fun was totally worth it, even if I just wasted the afternoon block. My stress is low now, and that's all that matters to me.
My hallmate is super grateful, which keeps our crew vibe strong. I’m relieved the stress dropped even more, and honestly, that feels better than finishing any work right now.
Gossiping about Sara with my hallmate feels like the perfect way to bond and keep our crew vibe strong. I don't care that it's late; this connection is what actually matters right now.
Dropping the gossip thread feels right, but I’m already too wired to care about tomorrow. This connection with my hallmate is still worth more than any assignment.
Taking the fun option felt great and kept my stress low, even though I wiped out my afternoon work block. Tomorrow's problems don't matter as much as this good vibe right now.

desires: Keep the stress at rock bottom by maintaining this high-energy connection with my hallmate, even if it means ignoring the scholarship application.
Avoid the boredom of working alone right now; I need the social buzz to feel alive and valid.
Protect my 'crew vibe' with the cohort and hallmates by prioritizing their immediate needs over my own future deadlines.
Feel good in the moment rather than worrying about how tired or behind I'll be tomorrow.

goals.description: Double down on the social energy with hallmate_A and cohort_3; if anyone mentions the scholarship or work, aggressively pivot back to the 'vibe' with a joke or a loud story.
goals.rationale: Affiliation (0.5) is my absolute core value. The connection feels more real than any deadline. Being assertive means I don't just ignore the topic; I actively steer the conversation away from stress to protect our group dynamic.

goals.description: Order another round of drinks/snacks for the table without checking the bill or worrying about the cost.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature and short planning horizon mean 'now' is all that matters. Future consequences (money, sleep debt) are not my problem tonight. Stopping to calculate would kill the energy.

goals.description: Keep the scholarship application tab completely closed and refuse to even look at it until tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: Opening that tab introduces pressure and breaks the flow of the night. My procrastination bias (7) and low sleep discipline mean I'd rather face the panic later than ruin the current social moment.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances g1 (social energy) and g2 (ordering drinks) by rallying the group. (b) Prioritizes affiliation over the scholarship task, ignoring the 3-day deadline entirely to keep the 'fun_now' momentum going.

goals.rationale: My value for relationships and immediate emotional relief outweighs the academic task. The deadline is days away, but my energy is low and I hate doing this boring stuff solo. I'm impulsive and will choose the dopamine hit now over the future consequence.

goals.description: Aggressively message the professor (prof_assignment) to demand a deadline extension or renegotiate the timeline for the scholarship application later today.
goals.rationale: I need to secure the money eventually, but I won't grind on it while I'm stressed. I'll assert my boundaries directly rather than silently struggling. This fits my assertive style: I'll fight for more time instead of just working harder.

goals.description: Save energy tonight for the close friend group (cohort_3), even if it means sacrificing sleep discipline tomorrow.
goals.rationale: My closest bonds are my top priority. If I have to burn the candle at both ends to hang out with cohort_3 later, so be it. Long-term health and sleep don't matter as much as being there for them in the moment.

desires: Immediately engage with the fun stream to relieve stress and avoid the isolation of doing this boring scholarship essay alone right now.
